name: Assorted Vegetables (Namool)
recipeIngredient: 9 oz Daikon radish, peeled and thinly julienned
2 oz Carrot, peeled and thinly julienned
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the spinach thoroughly.
2. Peel and julienne the daikon radish into thin strips.
3. Peel and julienne the carrot into thin strips.
4. Mix the julienned vegetables with salt to taste.
5. Drain and rinse the soybean sprouts, then mix them with the vegetable mixture.
6. Add cooked fiddleheads to the dish.
7. Combine sesame oil and ground sesame seeds in a small bowl.
8. Stir the sesame seasoning into the vegetable mixture until well combined.
9. Season the spinach separately with minced green onion, sesame oil, salt, and ground sesame seeds.
10. Mix the seasoned spinach with the main vegetable mixture.
11. Taste and adjust the seasoning as needed.
12. Turn off the heat when serving.
